title: TaskRoutingResult
description: Structured output schema for the Orchestrator Agent task routing result.

task_type.description: The routing category selected by the Orchestrator Agent.

reason.description: A concise explanation for why this task type was selected.

detected_triggers.description: Keywords or signals detected in the user input that influenced routing.

next_agents.description: The agent sequence that should process the task next.

missing_information.description: Questions or missing information required when task_type is unclear.

risk_flags.description: Initial high-risk signals detected by the Orchestrator Agent.
